title: Switzerland says 'initial negotiations' on final US-Iran deal to begin Friday
gist: Podcast brief: Switzerland says initial negotiations on a final US-Iran deal will begin Friday, including Pakistani and Qatari representatives, as Israel talks with the US over its presence in southern Lebanon ahead of a planned Washington visit by Lebanese President Joseph Aoun.

insights.claim: Switzerland says initial negotiations on a final US-Iran deal will begin Friday, with representatives from Pakistan and Qatar participating as mediators.
insights.speaker: Al-Monitor
insights.so_what: A start date for final-deal talks is a calendar catalyst for the energy and regional-risk complex; the broad mediator roster signals seriousness.
insights.quote: The negotiations will include representatives from Pakistan and Qatar, the Swiss Foreign Ministry said

insights.claim: The US-Iran talks proceed as Israel negotiates with the US over its presence in southern Lebanon, ahead of a planned Washington visit by Lebanese President Joseph Aoun.
insights.speaker: Al-Monitor
insights.so_what: Confirms the Lebanon and US-Iran tracks are advancing in parallel; Aoun's Washington trip is a near-term event to watch for the Lebanon file.
insights.quote: as Israel engages in talks with the US on its presence in southern Lebanon ahead of a planned Washington trip by Lebanese President Joseph Aoun
